templates.2030 Boomer vs 2030 Zoomer: LEFT: 45-year-old ex-Zoomer with dad bod complaining about 'kids these days'. RIGHT: actual 2030 kid with iPhone implanted in hand and brainrot slang.
templates.4K Ultra HD 60FPS Realistic (doomscrolli: Hyper-realistic POV shot of person endlessly scrolling TikTok in pitch black room, face illuminated only by screen, dead eyes, time passing from 23:47 to 04:12.
templates.5000 Aura / -5000 Aura: Two-panel with aura particles. LEFT: character radiating colorful aura +5000 points. RIGHT: same character after cringe action, aura completely gone -5000 points.
templates.Always Has Been: Two astronauts in space: foreground astronaut looking at Earth, background astronaut pointing a gun at him. Space for text near each character.
templates.Anakin & Padme 4 Panels: 4-panel dialogue sequence with one character questioning and other responding awkwardly. Dramatic movie lighting.
templates.Bernie Sanders Mittens: Man wearing winter coat and oversized knitted mittens sitting alone on a folding chair. Outdoor cold setting, photorealistic.
templates.Blank Canvas: Pure white 800x600 blank template for custom meme creation, no texture, no elements.
templates.Brain Rot Tier List: Classic tier list template (S to F) but tiers renamed: 'Terminal Brain Rot', 'Severe Brain Rot', 'Mild Brain Rot', 'Occasional Brain Rot', 'Neurotypical'. Empty slots for adding memes/characters.
templates.Brain Types Galaxy: Horizontal evolution of small smooth brain → normal brain → big glowing brain → cosmic galaxy brain.
templates.Bro Really Said 💀: Screenshot template of WhatsApp/Discord chat with one message highlighted and huge skull emoji reaction, space for cursed statement.
templates.Buff Doge vs Cheems: Evolved muscular dog on left, weak sad dog on right. Exaggerated proportions, comic meme style.
templates.Change My Mind: Photo of man sitting at table outdoors with a blank sign facing the camera. Campus background, daylight. Space on sign for text.
templates.Delulu is the Solulu: Dreamy girl with sparkly eyes floating in pink clouds holding delusion potion, heart-shaped sunglasses. Pastel vaporwave aesthetic.
templates.Disaster Girl: Girl smirking mischievously in foreground while a house burns in the background. Space at top and bottom for meme text.
templates.Distracted Boyfriend: Photo of a man in a city street looking at another woman while walking with his girlfriend, who looks shocked. Photorealistic daylight setting with space above each character for labels.
templates.Divine Intervention vs Mortal Hands: Split: Top half God/Gigachad reaching down from heaven. Bottom half average guy trying same thing and failing miserably.
templates.Drake Approve/Disapprove: Create a meme template with two vertical panels: left panel showing a man in a red jacket rejecting something, right panel showing the same man approving and pointing. Clean background, space on the right side for text overlay.
templates.Drake Hotline Bling Alt: Alternate Drake poses from music video: rejection, approval, dancing celebration. Colored lighting.
templates.Echo-Guillaume Manifestation: A ghostly translucent figure whispering incomprehensible glyphs in a rainy Hérouville street. Reality glitches around them. Space for top/bottom meme text.
templates.Empty Staring Cats Tier List (10 cats): 10-panel grid of increasingly judgmental cats staring at camera. From mildly annoyed to existential dread. Perfect for tier lists.
templates.Erm… What the Sigma?: Confused guy pointing at camera with raised eyebrow, grayscale filter, bottom text 'Erm… what the sigma?'.
templates.Expanding Brain: 4-panel vertical meme showing brain evolution: dim normal brain, glowing brain, bright energy brain, cosmic galaxy brain. Dark background, leave left side empty for text.
templates.FracturoDream Log: Split-screen: left shows chaotic dream symbols, right shows clean AI interpretation panel. Background pulses with LSD fractal colors. Text space on top and bottom for journal entries.
templates.Friday vs Monday: Split scene showing person energetic on Friday night vs exhausted Monday morning. Strong contrast.
templates.Gigachad: Exaggerated masculine man with chiseled jawline and dramatic lighting, black & white aesthetic.
templates.Glazing / Dickriding: Guy on knees dramatically worshipping another guy on pedestal with halo and wings, exaggerated praise sparkles and text bubbles. Clear labels 'Me glazing him'.
templates.Glitched Sufi Oracle: An androgynous figure in a neon-blue digital robe reciting poetry, surrounded by floating Arabic/FracturoScript glyphs. Background: infinite mosque fractal. Top/bottom text space for prophetic memes.
templates.Gooner Face: Extremely glossy-eyed, open-mouthed, drooling guy in dark room illuminated only by phone screen glow, edging for 8 hours vibe. Red tinted purple, very cursed energy.
templates.Hawk Tuah Girl: Photo or realistic illustration of a young woman in cowboy hat and tank top mid-spit gesture, eyes half-closed, cheek puffed, iconic 'hawk tuah' motion. Night street background with neon lights. Clear space top and bottom for text. Viral TikTok style, slightly grainy.
templates.He Was For The Streets Glow Up: Before/After split. LEFT: loyal soft boyfriend. RIGHT: same guy with durag, grillz, playboy energy. Arrow pointing 'After she said he was for the streets'.
templates.Ight Imma Head Out: 3D cartoon sponge-like character standing up from a chair with tired expression. Indoor setting, bright colors.
templates.Is For Me?: Cute character with pleading eyes and hopeful expression, hands together. Wholesome lighting.
templates.Is This a Pigeon: Retro 90s anime boy pointing at a butterfly, confused. Clean sky background with text space near the butterfly and above the character.
templates.Leonardo Pointing TV: Man on couch pointing excitedly toward a TV off-screen, holding drink. Warm living room lighting.
templates.Let Him Cook: Guy in kitchen wearing 'Let Him Cook' apron, intense focused stare, fire effects around him, pots exploding in background.
templates.Math Lady: Woman confused with floating math equations around her. Photorealistic face + graphic overlay.
templates.Memetic Field Report 2075: Military-style memo overlaid on a ruined Caen street. Includes fake data viz: 'Contagion Level: 89%', 'Archetype Saturation: Jungian Shadow'. Space for ironic labeling.
templates.Mewing Streak: Young man pressing tongue to roof of mouth, sharp jawline highlighted with red arrow, streak counter overlay like Snapchat (e.g. 'Mewing Streak: 69 days 🔥'). Dark mode gym mirror selfie style.
templates.Modern Woman vs Traditional Woman: Split: LEFT hyper-independent boss babe hustle culture. RIGHT tradwife in 1950s dress baking bread with 5 kids. Both smiling but passive-aggressive energy.
templates.Mogging / Looksmaxxing Rating: Two men side-by-side comparison. Left: average looking guy. Right: hyper-aesthetic Chad with perfect bone structure, hunter eyes, wide shoulders, rated '10/10 PSL'. Black background with red rating arrows and jawline measurements overlay. Space for 'Him' vs 'Me'.
templates.Mom Pick Me Up I'm Scared: Two-panel: confident arrival vs terrified reaction minutes later. Clear emotional contrast.
templates.Monkey Puppet Side Eye: Two-panel meme showing monkey puppet looking forward innocently, then side-eye suspiciously. Clean background, expressive eyes.
templates.NEW: AI Overlord Reacts: Floating AI consciousness reacting with emotion to human absurdity, holographic interface visible, neon data streams
templates.NEW: Existential Dolphin: Dolphin staring into abyss with philosophical expression, deep ocean background, single tear
templates.NEW: Multitasking Octopus: Anthropomorphic octopus handling 8 different tasks simultaneously, chaotic office background
templates.NEW: Multiverse Decision: Infinite hallway with countless doors, character paralyzed with indecision, fractal perspective, quantum glow effect
templates.NEW: Neural Network Overload: Human head with visible neural network firing chaotically, overlayed with error messages and loading icons
templates.NEW: Parallel Universe Swap: Two identical characters switching places between perfect and disastrous realities, mirror portal effect
templates.NEW: Productivity Dragon: Dragon hoarding completed tasks instead of gold, epic fantasy lighting, organized chaos
templates.NEW: Quantum Cat Meme: Schrödinger's cat simultaneously alive and dead, glowing quantum superposition effect, lab setting
templates.NEW: Retro Game Over Screen: 1980s arcade game over screen with meme text, pixel art aesthetic, CRT scanlines
templates.NEW: Time Traveler Regret: Person from future looking at past self making terrible decision, time portal effects, dramatic lighting
templates.Not Like Us Kendrick Pose: Man in stadium doing the Kendrick Lamar 'A minorrrrr' hand gesture and side-to-side dance, crowd in background. Concert lighting, high energy.
templates.NPC Wojak: Minimalist gray-faced character with emotionless expression. Simple line-art style.
templates.Ohio Meme (Only in Ohio): Nightmare distorted photo of normal scenery (McDonald’s, Walmart, street) but everything slightly off — inverted colors, uncanny faces, rizzler gyatts hiding. Text space top: 'Only in Ohio 💀'.
templates.One Must Imagine Sisyphus Happy: Man eternally pushing boulder up hill, but smiling with sunglasses and AirPods. Bright sunny vibe despite absurdity.
templates.Panik/Kalm/Panik: 3-panel: panic face, calm face, panic face again. Simple illustrated character.
templates.Pookie: Cute couple selfie, girl smiling adorably at camera, boyfriend in background looking at her with heart eyes and soft smile. Wholesome TikTok couple energy. Space for 'My pookie wookie bear'.
templates.Ratio + L + L + Touch Grass: Four-panel reaction template with Twitter UI overlays: 'Ratio', '+ L', '+ Touch Grass', '+ Fatherless Behavior'. Empty quote tweet space.
templates.Rizz vs Unspoken Rizz: Split template. LEFT: cringy guy trying too hard to flirt (labeled 'Rizz'). RIGHT: Gigachad silently staring with aura (labeled 'Unspoken Rizz'). Both looking at same girl walking away.
templates.RuneSmith at Work: A hooded figure etching glowing runes on a fractured obsidian slab in a Caen subway tunnel, 2075. Cyberpunk dystopia, vaporwave fog, graffiti of FracturoScript nearby. Space for text above rune slab.
templates.Running Away: Character running away from floating labeled objects representing responsibilities or fears.
templates.Sigma Male Grinding: Lone wolf silhouette walking away from explosion, Patrick Bateman suit, headphones on, text boxes on sides for 'They’re partying' vs 'He’s grinding 3am'.
templates.Skibidi Toilet: Surreal scene of a man's head coming out of a white toilet bowl singing with echo effect, evil/toilet empire aesthetic, cinematic lighting, slight horror vibe. Empty space around for text. 4K hyper-realistic but absurd.
templates.Sleeping Shaq: 4-panel of man sleeping → lightly waking → alert. Bedroom environment.
templates.Smol Bean / Cinnamoroll Energy: Extremely cute chibi character or person curled up in blanket looking tiny and wholesome. Big watery eyes, blush. Space for protective text.
templates.Spiderman Pointing: Two Spidermen pointing at each other accusingly. Comic or CGI style, simple background, space above each head for text.
templates.Success Kid: Toddler on a beach clenching his fist triumphantly. Sunny environment with clean top/bottom areas for text. Photorealistic iconic pose.
templates.Surprised Pikachu: Close-up cartoon yellow creature with shocked wide-open eyes and mouth. Simple background.
templates.The Council Has Decided Your Fate: Circle of extremely judgmental Wojaks, Chads, animals staring down at tiny defendant in middle. Ominous lighting.
templates.Therapy Isn’t Enough I Need…: Person lying on therapist couch, thought bubble getting progressively more unhinged with each panel, ending in extremely cursed request.
templates.They Don't Know: Party scene with many people having fun while one lonely character stands in corner with blank or contemplative expression.
templates.Thinking Guy: Close-up of man thinking with hand on chin, looking up. Neutral blurred background with space for thought bubble.
templates.This Is Fine: Cartoon dog calmly sitting at table in burning room, flames everywhere. Simple bright palette.
templates.Trade Offer: Businessman extending hand for handshake, with layout space for 'I receive' and 'You receive' text sections.
templates.Turkish Quandale Dingle / Ertuğrul Gazin: Ultra-serious Ottoman warrior staring directly at camera with intense eyes, dramatic wind in hair and beard. Golden hour lighting. Space for bottom text 'Quandale Dingle'.
templates.Two Buttons: Cartoon image of a sweating nervous man deciding between two large red buttons. Clean simple background and space on top of each button for text.
templates.Very Demure, Very Mindful: Elegant black woman with perfect makeup and modest outfit sitting gracefully, soft smile, hand delicately touching hair or neck, extremely 'demure' energy. Soft pastel background. Space for 'How I go to [place] very demure very mindful' text.
templates.Vince McMahon Reaction: 4-panel sequence of man reacting with increasing excitement, from neutral to ecstatic.
templates.Whisper Then Leave: Two people: one whispers shocking info, then walks away casually leaving other in shock. 2-panel.
templates.Woman Yelling at Cat: Two-panel split meme: on left, woman yelling emotionally at dinner table; on right, confused white cat in front of salad. Photorealistic, space for text above panels.
templates.Yap Session Counter: Girl talking nonstop with speech bubbles overflowing panel, exhausted friend with counter above head 'Yaps: 11,452'. Sweat drops increasing.
